sources.title: So this is College (MGM, 1929) ROBERT MONTGOMERY 🍕ELLIOTT NUGENT 🍕SALLY STARR
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Robert Montgomery, Elliott Nugent, Sally Starr
Director: Sam Wood
🍕A Love Triangle with Letterman Jackets🍕
In MGM’s zippy collegiate comedy, inseparable frat bros ROBERT MONTGOMERY and ELLIOTT NUGENT find their friendship tested when they fall for the same vivacious co-ed, played by SALLY STARR. 

Expect lighthearted pranks, football action, and witty banter that capture the spirit of its era. Perfect for fans of early sound cinema, nostalgic comedies, and Golden Age Hollywood. 

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

🍕Subscribe to PizzaFLIX for more timeless gems from the Golden Age of Hollywood! Don’t forget to like, comment, and share if you love vintage cinema.🍕

#ClassicCinema #1929Film #PreCode #SamWood #RobertMontgomery #ElliottNugent #MGM #VintageComedy #CollegeFilm #FilmHistory #classicMovieMonday #PizzaFLIX

metadata.Plot: Biff and Eddie are the best of friends. They are college seniors, roommates at the fraternity, and star teammates on the USC football team. Then a flapper named Babs enters the picture. Biff considers Babs his girl, and she does like him more than Eddie, but Eddie is persistent. Everywhere they go, Eddie and Biff are competing for Babs. When Eddie backs off for the sake of the friendship, Babs decides that she wants him, and this causes the friendship to end. Their rivalry even threatens the team's play in the big Stanford football game.
metadata.Writer: Al Boasberg, Delmer Daves, Joseph Farnham
metadata.Actors: Elliott Nugent, Robert Montgomery, Cliff Edwards
